THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CURTIS, KARAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARLOWE, AMPARO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM OF $1750.00 IS FOR THE COST OF SURVEY AND IS NOT A TYPE OF COST ALLOWED UNDER CIVIL CODE 841. THERE IS NO OTHER LEGAL BASIS FOR AWARDING THIS AMOUNT. IF PLAINTIFF HAS COSTS THAT MAYBE CLAIMED UNDER CCP 841, THEY HAVE NOT BEEN ADJUDICATED IN THIS CASE. RICHARD MARLOWE IS NOT A PROPER DEFENDANT IN THIS ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
